sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102020" key="swmatobla/beia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σωμᾰτο-βλάβεια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βλᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n102020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bodily harm</tr_>, or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">injury</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:209" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">209</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
